problem id: eda44942
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10100100 -> 01001000
  01100100 -> 01000111
  00011010 -> 10100001
  11111000 -> 10001100
  01101011 -> 10110111
  11111110 -> 11101100
  11101101 -> 11011101
  11100101 -> 01011101
  00101001 -> 10010010
  11010111 -> 01111110

query: 00011100
predicted answer: 11000001
